{{Quote|Why would anyone come to Batuu? It's not important.|Roxi|<ref name="Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire" />}}
'''Roxi''' was a [[Gender|female]] member of the [[Gatherers]] at [[Savi's Workshop|Savi and Sons Salvage]] in [[Black Spire Outpost]] on [[Batuu]]. She used a [[Repulsorlift chair|hoverchair]].<ref name="Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire" />
